nasb.text: But it shall be when evening approaches, he shall bathe himself with water, and at sundown he may reenter the camp.

esv.text: but when evening comes, he shall bathe himself in water, and as the sun sets, he may come inside the camp.

cnv.text: 到了黃昏的時候，他要用水洗澡；日落了，他才可以進入營中。

ccb.text: 傍晚他要沐浴，日落才可以回营。
